benefits.description: Systemic effect; 200-300mcg/day for older injuries, 2mg for acute injury
BPC-157 noted as good for liver healing

protocol_notes: Commenter shares general protocol knowledge: BAC water for reconstitution, 200-300mcg/day dosing for chronic injuries, 2mg for acute. Does not confirm personal use explicitly but shares protocol details. Also mentions Semax/Selank as alternatives for ADHD/cognitive support. Self-disclaims as not an expert.
